title: mclient is unaware of merge tables and remote tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (i INTEGER, j TEXT, k DATE DEFAULT (DATE('now')));
CREATE TABLE mt1 (m INTEGER, n REAL, o BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1 (i, j) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM mt1 CROSS JOIN t1 WHERE t1.j IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: mclient fails with merge and remote table operations
